title: ApiProduct
description: An API product bundles API resources for consumption.

name.description: Internal name of the API product. Must be unique.

displayName.description: Name displayed in the developer portal.

approvalType.description: How API keys are approved for the product.

attributes.description: Custom attributes for the API product (max 18).

environments.description: Environments where this product is available.

proxies.description: API proxies included in this product.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes associated with the product.

quota.description: Number of requests permitted per quota interval.

quotaInterval.description: Time interval over which the quota is applied.

quotaTimeUnit.description: Time unit for the quota interval.

createdAt.description: Output only. Unix time when the product was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Unix time when the product was last modified.
